steps.title: Compare the two positions
steps.content: Text 1 claims UNESCO's selection clearly increased awareness and tourism. Text 2 is more cautious: cities need effective marketing, or visitors may not even know about the food scene.

steps.title: Keep the marketing qualification
steps.content: Choice A shifts to credit for the UNESCO selection. Choice C discusses whether the honor was overdue. Choice D adds broad benefits beyond tourism. The response should allow possible benefit but stress that more awareness through promotion is needed. The answer is B.
